content: Lydia: Damn this piss-worthy rain! Makes my fucking armor chafe my tits raw. Should’ve taken shelter when MJR mentioned it, but no, I just had to follow his tight ass into another godsdamned storm. hunter: Heh, sounds like you’re more focused on his ass than staying dry, lass. Seen plenty like you—trailing a man like a hungry wolf, praying he throws you a bone. Lydia: Fuck off, you leather-clad squirrel-fucker. At least my man’s got the balls to slay dragons, not just gut deer and jerk off in the bushes like you woodland hermits. hunter: Bold words from a woman dressed more for a brothel than battle. That bra hold your tits in or just give bandits something to aim at? Lydia: Better than your sad little bow, twig-arms. Bet you couldn’t even shoot a rabbit without shaking like a milk-drinker. MJR? He puts arrows through skulls from half a mile while I suck him off. Perfect fucking teamwork. hunter: By Dibella’s tits, no wonder the Stormcloaks are winning—too busy fucking each other to notice the war. Lydia: And the Imperials are too busy sucking Thalmor cock—wait, that’s your lot, isn’t it? Fucking boot-lickers. hunter: Pah. Keep talking like that and I might hunt instead. Meat’s meat, and you’re looking tender. Lydia: Try it, venison-breath. MJR’s gargoyle will rip your throat out before you nock that toothpick you call a bow. Now move—I’ve got a thane to guard and a wet cunt to offer him. Preferably not in that order. hunter: Sounds like your priorities are fucked, shield-sister. But who am I to judge? Happy hunting—just don’t blame me when your lordling drags you into another Draugr orgy. Lydia: At least Draugr fuck harder than Imperial milk-drinkers. Now

Lydia: Enough yapping, hunter. I’ve got better things to do—like convincing MJR to bend me over a fallen log and remind me why Dibella made women with backs that arch. hunter: Aye, go on then. Just don’t blame me when you’re limping tomorrow from more than battle wounds.

hunter: Gods, this rain is pissing me off. Can’t even track shit with the mud washing everything away. Saw a bear earlier though—big fucker, tore up a bandit camp like they were wet parchment. Hunter 2: Oh yeah? Bet the bandits screamed like little girls before they got mauled. Bears don’t give a shit about stealth—just raw power. Like some of the Dibella-worshipping freaks in Markarth. You hear what they did to that new priestess last week? hunter: Hah! Fuck, don’t remind me. Walked in on them once—whole temple was a writhing mess of skin and sweat. Priestess was taking three at once like it was morning prayers. Skyrim’s gone mad. Hunter 2: Mad? Nah, it’s just honest now. Rather fuck openly than pretend we’re all saints like the damn Stormcloaks. Speaking of, you see that group of ‘em get ambushed by Forsworn near Karthwasten? Bastards didn’t just kill ‘em—made ‘em scream first. hunter: Serves the racist pricks right. Though I ain’t saying the Forsworn are better—just batshit in a different way. Saw one of their hagravens riding a fucking troll yesterday. Bet that wasn’t just for battle. Hunter 2: Ugh, don’t make me imagine it. Still, beats freezing my tits off out here. Next time I shoot a deer, I’m skinning it warm just to feel something. hunter: Yeah, well, if you’re that desperate, there’s a giant camp not far from here. Just don’t come crying when they launch you halfway to High Hrothgar.

hunter: Giants? Fuck that. I'd rather take my chances with the hagravens. At least they're not dumb enough to punt you into the stratosphere for fun. Hunter 2: Fair point. Though, knowing you, you’d probably try and fuck the hagraven too before realizing she’s got talons where her tits should be. hunter: Heh, yeah… learned that one the hard way. Let’s just stick to deer and dumb bandits. Less likely to ruin my dignity.
